title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.774 - George Washington Highway designated for portion of State Highway 94 in St. Charles County
text:
227.774.  George Washington Highway designated for portion of State Highway 94 in St. Charles County. — The portion of State Highway 94 from State Highway TT to State Highway F in St. Charles County shall be designated as "George Washington Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
